command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== RUNNING PHASE 9E.0 GENERATOR ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/phase9e0_gen.py
python3 /tmp/phase9e0_gen.py

echo "=== COMMIT ==="
git add .
git status --short | head -60
git commit -m "Phase 9E.0 Living Agent Ecosystem Specification"

echo "=== TAG ==="
git tag Phase9E0-LivingAgentEcosystemSpec

echo "=== PUSH ==="
git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E0-LivingAgentEcosystemSpec
git push github main && git push github Phase9E0-LivingAgentEcosystemSpec

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
echo "--- docs added ---"
ls docs/living-agent-ecosystem.md docs/agent-personality-framework.md docs/agent-storytelling-engine.md docs/agent-memory-architecture.md docs/agent-relationship-system.md docs/agent-voice-system.md docs/agent-animation-system.md docs/agent-preservation-and-recovery.md docs/future-agent-onboarding.md
echo "--- agents ---"
ls agents/
echo "--- memory dirs ---"
find memory/ -type d | sort
echo "--- log ---"
git log --oneline -3
git tag -l | tail -5
